articles.title: Germany vs Ivory Coast score: Deniz Undav's dramatic double punches ticket to round of 32 for Europeans - CBS Sports
articles.description: The Stuttgart man came on in the second half and scored twice, including the winner in stoppage time
articles.content:
There are three changes in the Ivory Coast lineup as Seko Fofana, Bazoumana Toure, and Ely Wahi all hit the bench after the first match.
Starting XI: Yahia Fofana; Guela Doue, Wilfried Singo, Emmanu… [+116 chars]
